prompt: Create a syncopated chord pattern — hit the chord just before beat 1 (anticipation) and hold it through the bar.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p _q _q _q _e. x
    n 48 52 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p _q _q _q _e. x
    n 53 57 60

    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly placed the chord on the last 16th note of the measure to anticipate the downbeat of the next bar.
judgment.quality_reason: While the anticipation is perfectly timed, the AI used a 16th note ('x') which does not hold the chord through the next bar as requested.
